identificationModule.briefTitle: Effects of a Pre-Workout Dietary Supplement on Training Adaptations

primaryOutcomes.measure: Examine the effects of C4 supplementation during resistance training by assessing body water
Examine the effects of C4 supplementation during resistance training by assessing body composition
Examine the effects of C4 supplementation during resistance training by assessing macronutrient intake
Examine the effects of C4 supplementation during resistance training by assessing 1 RM (repetition maximum) strength
Examine the effects of C4 supplementation during resistance training by assessing anaerobic sprint capacity
Examine the effects of C4 supplementation during resistance training by assessing muscle creatine levels
Examine the effects of C4 supplementation during resistance training by assessing muscle carnosine levels
Examine the effects of C4 supplementation during resistance training by assessing cognitive function (i.e., Stroop Color and Word Test, Word Recall Test and Readiness to perform VAS)

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Measure standard clinical chemistry panels in the blood to evaluate safety
Record side effects to evaluate safety
Measure heart rate to evaluate safety
Measure blood pressure to evaluate safety

identificationModule.briefTitle: Anaplerotic Therapy in Propionic Acidemia

primaryOutcomes.measure: Define safety and efficacy of nutritional therapy with these investigational products: L-Ornithine alpha-ketoglutarate, Glutamine, or disodium citrate (anaplerotic therapy) on hyperammonemia and outcome in patients with propionic acidemia.

secondaryOutcomes.measure: Define the effect of citrate, alpha-ketoglutarate and glutamine on plasma amino acids, acylcarnitines, ammonia, lactic acid and urine organic acids in patients with propionic acidemia.
Evaluate the effect of investigational products on the developmental quotient and medical complications in patients with propionic acidemia.
